title: The Supremely Good Creator Made All Things Good.

source.title: NPNF1-03. On the Holy Trinity; Doctrinal Treatises; Moral Treatises

verses.text: By the Trinity, thus supremely and equally and unchangeably good, all things were created; and these are not supremely and equally and unchangeably good, but yet they are good, even taken separately.
Taken as a whole, however, they are very good, because their ensemble constitutes the universe in all its wonderful order and beauty.
